untranslatable_reason: Relative Strength Rank (12-month percentile ranking) is not available in the allowed indicators list. The 'returns' field was used as a proxy for momentum/strength, but true RS ranking requires cross-sectional comparison against all stocks in universe, which cannot be computed from single-stock OHLCV data. Institutional ownership detection also requires fundamental data not in technical indicators list.
translation_notes: Signal references: (1) RS Rank >= 75 — approximated as positive 12-month returns >= 0.75 (75% gain), but this is NOT equivalent to percentile ranking; (2) Institutional ownership — cannot be translated without fundamental data; volume > 0 used as proxy for institutional participation; (3) Price > 200-day MA — translated directly using sma_200; (4) Exit on RS < 60 and price below 200-day MA — translated as returns < 0.60 or close < sma_200. WARNING: This translation significantly deviates from original signal intent due to missing Relative Strength Rank indicator.
